## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metronome and Growth X to discuss progress on pricing index project and address key issues.](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New error table in Content OS for organizing pricing index data; initial 20 batch added](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Three prototype docs (Character.ai, DeepSeek, Perplexity) ready for Metronome's review](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Some companies lack public pricing info; prioritizing those with available data](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [EXA and Tavily identified as powerful research tools for finding hard-to-access information](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

## Topics

### Error Table and Content Organization

  - [New tab in Content OS for pricing index data](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Initial 20 batch added to demonstrate structure](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Tagging system for service categories, pricing/packaging models](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [Plan to create comprehensive docs for each entry](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Final content will be accessible in Google Docs within Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)

### Prototype Review Process

  - [Three initial prototypes: Character.ai, DeepSeek, Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Two main sections: editorial chunk (industry summary) and pricing model analysis](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - ["Metronome's take" section crucial for review](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Feedback requested on accuracy and tone](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Full versions of all 20 entries expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Pricing Information Challenges

  - [Some companies lack public pricing pages](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Researcher exploring alternative sources (documentation, mentions)](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [May consider scheduling sales calls as last resort](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Prioritizing companies with available pricing info](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Special cases (e.g., Merkur) will require extra effort due to importance](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### Research Tools and Techniques

  - [EXA (E-X-A) identified as powerful tool for finding paywalled/deep web info](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Tavily (T-A-V-I-L-Y) good for lighter-weight research](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [EXA more expensive per call, but better for technical/granular topics](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### Company Name Clarifications

  - [Some duplicates/unclear entries in target company list](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

  - Sheet appears truncated at entry \#24 (just "H" listed)

### Content Delivery and Platform

  - [Considering Webflow for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [60% of Growth X clients use Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [High confidence in ability to deliver if Webflow is chosen](https://fathom.video/share/-SzNb8AFjsk4GrsGSAkPCyz3tq-P5vty?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
